title: The Powerpuff Girls: A Documentary
description: You might know them as those three cute little girls, saving the day before bedtime. Well, for Brian Larsen, that’s not enough. He wants to know what makes ’em tick.
altHero: faraway shot of the blue, pink, and green trails of the Powerpuff Girls as they fly away from a smoking city
alt2: Townsville on a map with lots of red dots on and around it
alt3: newspaper with headline “PPGS save the day”
alt4: Carl Jusscarl, domestic waste dispoal technician
